## Checklist

- [ ] I am not merging directly into main without testing on staging.
- [ ] I tested the affected route/page locally.
- [ ] I tested on mobile if this affects NFC/QR/buyer/agent flows.
- [ ] I confirmed Supabase writes are safe.
